Create Generic Credential
Type: Query Auth
Name: token
Your Browserless API Key

## Update
Checks whether previously upserted URLs have changed since the last Upsert, avoiding a full crawl and scrape.
Compares headers like Created Date, Last Modified, ETag, and Hash to detect changes.
Fields can be excluded in the Compare node if they cause false positives.

Possible Fields to Skip:
Created Date
Last Modified
ETag
Hash
